TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Fred_Brown, title = Fred_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fred_Brown} }

S.FORM: Fred Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1948, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 8, Fred Brown, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Fred Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1948, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 8, Fred Brown, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
